name: Apfelpfannkuchen (Apple Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, and salt.
2. Beat eggs and milk together in a bowl until combined.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the egg mixture; stir until smooth.
4. Cook apples in 1/4 cup butter until tender. Mix 2 tablespoons of sugar and cinnamon; toss with apples.
5. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a deep-fry pan (6-inch diameter).
6. Pour batter into the hot oil so it forms a layer about 1/4 inch thick.
7. When set, place apple slices on top of the pancake; cover with more batter.
8. Fry until lightly browned on both sides. Keep warm.
9. Repeat steps 5-8 two more times, using all the remaining batter and apples.
10. Serve immediately.
